hero.headline: Help us build an AI assistant that truly understands how to answer patient questions
hero.intro: Lung Cancer Europe is developing the LuCE Chatbot — an AI-powered information assistant designed specifically for lung cancer patients and their close ones. To build something genuinely useful, we need to hear from you: what questions matter most? What do you wish you'd known? What do patients and caregivers actually ask?

about.heading: Why your questions matter
about.p1: A lung cancer diagnosis brings an immediate need to understand — what this means, what comes next, what to ask the doctor. But consultations are short, the internet is overwhelming, and most online information wasn't written for the person sitting with that news today.
about.p2: People seek clear and trustworthy answers to both the fundamental questions — about diagnosis, staging, and treatment options — and the deeply personal ones: side effects, daily life, how to talk to family, what to push for in an appointment.
about.p3: The LuCE Chatbot is being built around those questions — gathered directly from patients, caregivers, and healthcare professionals across Europe. Your contribution shapes what it covers from day one.

howItWorks.heading: What happens with your questions
howItWorks.step1Desc: Share anything you've wondered about lung cancer — diagnosis, treatment, side effects, daily life, or anything else. Questions can be in any language.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our team reviews all submissions, groups related questions together, and identifies the topics that matter most across different patient populations.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Medical experts and patient advocates review the clustered questions and work together to develop accurate, trustworthy, and accessible answers.
howItWorks.step4Title: The chatbot launches with your input at its core
howItWorks.step4Desc: The LuCE Chatbot launches with a knowledge base built from real patient questions — not assumptions. Your contribution shapes what it knows from day one.

form.heading: What do you want to know?
form.intro: Share the questions you have — or have had — about lung cancer. There are no wrong questions. You can submit as many as you like, in any language.
form.privacyTitle: Please do not share personal or medical information
form.privacyBody: This form is for collecting general questions only — not personal stories, diagnoses, test results, or medication details. Ask your question in general terms: "What are the side effects of X?" rather than "I am taking X and experiencing Y." Do not include your name, email, or any identifying details in your questions.
form.anythingElseLabel: Anything you would like us to know?
form.anythingElsePlaceholder: Feel free to share any context, thoughts, or anything else on your mind…
form.questionsHintWarning: Do not include personal medical details, diagnoses, or identifying information.
form.mailingListLabel: Keep me updated about the LuCE Chatbot — I'd like to hear when it launches and how to test it.
form.mailingListEmailReminder: To receive updates, please add your email address above.
form.consentLabel: I understand my questions and basic demographic information will be stored securely by Lung Cancer Europe and used solely to inform the development of the LuCE Chatbot. My responses will not be shared publicly or used for any other purpose. I confirm I have not included any personal medical information in my questions.
form.validationMinQuestion: Please add at least one question before submitting.
form.validationConsent: Please tick the consent checkbox to continue.
form.validationEmailRequired: You've opted in for updates — please add your email address so we can reach you.
form.validationEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

success.heading: Thank you for contributing.
success.p1: Your questions have been submitted. We will review them carefully and they will help shape what the LuCE Chatbot covers first.
success.p2: If you opted in for updates, we will be in touch when the chatbot is ready to test.
